how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm. Never cd ~/Ethica — stay in ~ and use full paths. Use source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate to enter venv.
session_045_completed: IMAGE VIEWER — PNG/JPG drop support added to both drop zones. scroll_drop.py SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS extended with .png/.jpg/.jpeg. main_window.py _on_file_drop gets elif ext in ('.png','.jpg','.jpeg') branch → canvas._drop_as_image(). canvas_window.py _on_canvas_file_drop gets IMAGE_EXTS check before DEBUG_MAP — routes to _drop_as_image() before binary read corrupts content. _drop_as_image() method added: PIL.Image.open → thumbnail(900,900) → ImageTk.PhotoImage → CanvasTab(mode='pdf') → images[] → _switch_tab(). Sealed.

YAML ROUTING FIX — canvas_window.py _on_canvas_file_drop was routing .yaml/.yml through DEBUG_MAP to push_debug_from_ethica (debug tab). Fixed: DOC_EXTS check now includes yaml/yml explicitly → _drop_as_document(). Sealed.

DYNAMIC CHAT BUBBLE WRAPLENGTH — chat_window.py: hardcoded wraplength=520 replaced with dynamic calculation. self.canvas.update_idletasks() → winfo_width() → max(300, width - 68 - 28). Applied to both user label and MarkdownRenderer. Text now fills bubble width at any window size. Sealed.

PDF MODE EDITOR RESTORE — canvas_window.py _switch_tab pdf mode block: when switching to a pdf/image tab from Sketch/Debug/Project, special views are now hidden (pack_forget for debug_view, destroy for sketch/project with try/except guards) and _editor is re-packed before writing images. Fixes blank image tab when another special view was active. Sealed.

BADWINDOW CRASH FIX — X11 BadWindow errors bypass Python sys.excepthook — crash reporter cannot catch them. Root cause: _debug_view.destroy() firing while async DEBUG_WRITE was in flight. Fix: replaced destroy() with pack_forget() for _debug_view in pdf mode switch. No more dead window ID sent to X server. Sealed.
session_045_still_open: JARVIS CVE CLONE — git clone https://github.com/Trinity963/cvelistV5 ~/cvelistV5/ then verify jarvis search works.
GITHUB PREP — README, install instructions, module authoring guide.

~/Ethica/ui/canvas_window.py — _drop_as_image() method added, _on_canvas_file_drop image branch + YAML fix, pdf mode block: editor re-pack + safe view teardown + BadWindow fix (pack_forget not destroy for debug_view)

critical_debug_context.image_viewer_note: Images render in CanvasTab(mode='pdf') using ImageTk.PhotoImage. tab.images[] holds refs — do not clear this list or GC kills the display. _drop_as_image uses thumbnail(900,900) — large images scale down preserving aspect. Both drop zones now handle images: main_window._on_file_drop and canvas_window._on_canvas_file_drop.
critical_debug_context.badwindow_note: X11 BadWindow errors cannot be caught by Python sys.excepthook or crash reporter. Prevention only: never call destroy() on a widget that may have async writes in flight. Use pack_forget() instead. _debug_view is specifically at risk — DEBUG_WRITE is async.
critical_debug_context.dynamic_wraplength_note: Bubble wraplength = max(300, self.canvas.winfo_width() - 68 - 28). self.canvas is the tk.Canvas scroll widget in ChatWindow. update_idletasks() called before winfo_width() to ensure geometry is resolved.
critical_debug_context.yaml_routing_note: YAML/YML were in DEBUG_MAP routing to debug tab. Fixed in _on_canvas_file_drop: DOC_EXTS check now includes yaml/yml. Main window drop was already routing correctly via else branch.
critical_debug_context.venv_note: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — it creates a new .venv. Always stay in ~ and use full paths ~/Ethica/... Enter venv with: source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: All commands must use full paths ~/Ethica/... — never cd into the project directory.
critical_debug_context.manifest_tools_format: Module manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — NOT plain strings.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules need THREE registrations: (1) folder + manifest + tool file. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers in chat_engine.py.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
New modules: THREE registrations — folder, MODULE_DIRS (guard), MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers (chat_engine)
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
repr() first when string match fails
NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always
Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings
Never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight — use pack_forget() instead
lesson_learned_045: X11 BadWindow errors bypass Python sys.excepthook entirely — crash reporter cannot catch them. Prevention only: use pack_forget() not destroy() on widgets that may have async operations in flight. _debug_view is specifically vulnerable to this. Also: canvas drop zone has its own _on_canvas_file_drop handler — both drop paths must be patched when adding new file type support.
philosophy: Session 045 — Ethica can see now. Drop a blueprint, drop a screenshot, drop a diagram — she holds it in the canvas and knows it's there. The ecosystem grows eyes. ⟁Σ∿∞
